title: FOOGO Green 50 Disposable Sugarcane Bagasse Bowls, Large 32oz (900ml), 8"(20cm), for Soup, Desserts & Salad, Deep Round, Sturdy Paper Bowls for Hot Food, Biodegradable, Bamboo, Party
features: PREMIUM QUALITY and STURDY - Our strong disposable sugarcane bagasse bowls do not bend or collapse under weight and you can hold your food confidently with one hand. Suitable for any type of food – hot, cold, dry, wet, sticky, sweet, spicy – you name it!
A true GIFT FROM NATURE – Made from sugarcane bagasse, FOOGO Green biodegradable bowls are 100% natural and free from chemicals or harmful ingredients.

A GREENER alternative - Our eco friendly disposable bowls are biodegradable and can be used instead of paper bowls or plastic bowls that are harmful to the environment. They are also a great alternative to bamboo disposable bowls and wooden disposable bowls.
MEETS YOUR NEEDS - Our biodegradable bowls are designed to meet your needs. We're certain you'll be pleased with the quality and design of these biodegradable bowls.
COMPOSTABLE and BIODEGRADABLE - When used dispose them along with food or garden waste. Easy and safe disposal into fire pits during camping trips and barbecues.
MICROWAVE and FREEZER safe - FOOGO disposable plates are heat and cold resistant, and can be used for both hot and cold foods, making them perfect for any occasion.

One-stop-shop for ECO PARTY SUPPLIES - Our range of products includes disposable plates and cutlery sets, eco-friendly napkins, biodegradable straws, wooden cutlery sets, disposable bowls and serving trays.

Click to play video Play Mute Current Time  0:00 / Duration  1:00 Loaded : 10.01% 0:00 Stream Type  LIVE Seek to live, currently behind live LIVE Remaining Time  - 1:00   1x Playback Rate Chapters Chapters Descriptions descriptions off , selected Captions Captions off , selected English (Automated) Audio Track default , selected Fullscreen This is a modal window. hero-video Merchant video A greener alternative. Old challenge. New solution. We believe that convenience shouldn't be at the cost of the planet. Decades of single-use plastic usage is having an adverse impact on the planet and this is our solution. Made from sugarcane pulp, we have turned an agricultural waste into stylish disposable tableware. Be good. Do good. We are Carbon Neutral. We offset all carbon emissions right from manufacturing, all the way to delivery to customers. We do this by actively contributing to green initiatives around the world, from generation of sustainable wind energy in India to provision of clean cookstoves in Uganda. Gift from nature. Waste as a resource. The dinnerware is made from sugarcane pulp that is left behind after the juice is extracted. High temperature moulds are used to convert the pulp into plates, bowls and other tableware. Turning what would have been an agricultural waste into highly useful products is sustainability at its best. All occasions. Be it a wedding, corporate event or a backyard barbecue, our eco-conscious tableware is a sensible option. They are perfect for zero waste parties, picnics, camping and outside events where it may not be possible to wash-up afterwards. And more... Sugarcane bagasse dinnerware is made from the fibre that is left behind after the juice is extracted from sugarcane. The fibre is mixed with water and pressed into shape using high temperature moulds. How different is it from paper plates and bowls? Unlike paper plates and bowls, no trees are harmed in the making of sugarcane tableware. We use sugarcane fibre, which is a by-product of cane sugar manufacturing to create these elegant, disposable plates. How sturdy and durable are they? Sugarcane dinnerware is much sturdier than disposable paper and plastic tableware. They are leakproof and can be used with oily and greasy foods as well. Even though they are disposable, you could wipe and reuse them if they are not too soiled. Are sugarcane bagasse dishes microwavable? Are they fridge and freezer safe? Yes, sugarcane bagasse dishes are safe to use in microwave, ideally for reheating food. They are fridge and freezer safe, making it easy to store excess food in the icy racks of the fridge and freezer. Can I clean and reuse sugarcane bagasse products? Though designed for one-time use, sugarcane bagasse products are sturdy enough to be reused a few times. When used with non-sticky/non-greasy food, the plates and bowls can be wiped clean/washed, dried and reused.
